disclosure: This is a static Annona demo dataset bundle bundled with the app. It is not live production data.

tables.name: customers
tables.description: Customer dimension rows for downstream sales-order ownership.

tables.name: factories
tables.description: Factory dimension rows for the manufacturing dependency graph.

tables.name: machines
tables.description: Machine or workcenter rows used to locate constrained work orders.

tables.name: parts
tables.description: Part and assembly master rows covering finished kits, subassemblies, and purchased components.

tables.name: sales_orders
tables.description: Sales-order headers for customer demand entering the manufacturing graph.

tables.name: sales_order_lines
tables.description: Sales-order lines that anchor finished-good demand to the root work order.

tables.name: bom_components
tables.description: Multi-level BOM edges between parent assemblies and required child components or subassemblies.

tables.name: work_orders
tables.description: Work orders for finished kits and subassemblies, including parent-child dependency chains.

tables.name: purchase_orders
tables.description: Purchase-order headers for bought components required by open work orders.

tables.name: purchase_order_lines
tables.description: Purchase-order lines linking component supply to the blocked or at-risk work orders they feed.

relationships.name: sales_orders_to_customers
relationships.description: Join each sales order to its customer.

relationships.name: sales_orders_to_factories
relationships.description: Join each sales order to the factory expected to fulfill it.

relationships.name: sales_orders_to_sales_order_lines
relationships.description: Join each sales-order header to its line demand.

relationships.name: sales_order_lines_to_parts
relationships.description: Join each sales-order line to the finished kit being ordered.

relationships.name: sales_order_lines_to_root_work_orders
relationships.description: Join each sales-order line to the root work order expected to build it.

relationships.name: bom_components_to_parent_parts
relationships.description: Join each BOM row to its parent assembly part.

relationships.name: bom_components_to_child_parts
relationships.description: Join each BOM row to its child subassembly or component part.

relationships.name: work_orders_to_parts
relationships.description: Join each work order to the part it is building.

relationships.name: work_orders_to_factories
relationships.description: Join each work order to its factory.

relationships.name: work_orders_to_machines
relationships.description: Join each work order to its primary machine or workcenter.

relationships.name: work_orders_to_parent_work_orders
relationships.description: Join each child work order back to its parent work order when the build is multi-level.

relationships.name: purchase_orders_to_factories
relationships.description: Join each purchase order to its destination factory.

relationships.name: purchase_order_lines_to_purchase_orders
relationships.description: Join each purchase-order line to its header.

relationships.name: purchase_order_lines_to_parts
relationships.description: Join each purchase-order line to the component being bought.

relationships.name: purchase_order_lines_to_work_orders
relationships.description: Join each purchase-order line to the work order it currently feeds.
